description: Workday OAuth 2.0, Integration System User (ISU) credentials, Report-as-a-Service URLs, and HRIS/Finance red flags.

token_patterns.name: Workday Report-as-a-Service URL (often with embedded creds)
token_patterns.notes: RaaS URLs are often called with Basic Auth — the URL alone is a target.

misconfigurations.title: Single Integration System User used by multiple unrelated integrations
misconfigurations.rationale: ISUs grant broad domain access; sharing makes attribution impossible.
misconfigurations.fix: Provision one ISU per integration; bind via Integration System Security Group.

misconfigurations.title: ISU configured without IP allowlist / API client allowlist
misconfigurations.rationale: ISU passwords leak through CI logs / vendor systems; IP restriction limits replay.
misconfigurations.fix: Maintain > User-Based Security Groups > restrict to Integration System Security Group with allowed source IPs configured at the tenant edge.

misconfigurations.title: MFA not enforced for tenant-admin / HR-admin users
misconfigurations.rationale: Workday holds payroll, bank, comp — admin ATO = SOX-relevant incident.
misconfigurations.fix: Authentication > Multi-Factor Authentication — enforce for admin security groups.

misconfigurations.title: Custom Report exposed as RaaS without authentication
misconfigurations.rationale: Public RaaS URLs have been used to leak entire workforce datasets.
misconfigurations.fix: Each Custom Report's 'Enable as Web Service' must require an authenticated principal.

admin_red_flags.title: RaaS URL called returning > 10k rows in one request
admin_red_flags.rationale: Tenant-wide RaaS pull is a top exfil shape for HCM / Finance data.
admin_red_flags.signal: Tenant logs / API audit: customreport2 call with response row-count > 10000.

admin_red_flags.title: Security group / domain security policy modified
admin_red_flags.signal: Audit log: `Maintain Domain Security Policies` modification outside scheduled changes.

admin_red_flags.title: ISU password reset event
admin_red_flags.rationale: Often follows compromise of CI-stored creds.
admin_red_flags.signal: Audit log: `Reset Password` on user_type=Integration System User.

admin_red_flags.title: Mass worker / mass compensation EIB load by unusual principal
admin_red_flags.rationale: EIB (Enterprise Interface Builder) loads can mutate every worker — used in fraud schemes.
admin_red_flags.signal: Audit log: `Launch / Edit EIB Inbound` outside the integrations admin group.
